rationale: No major new developments directly affecting Poland this cycle; El Niño adds indirect climate/energy risk, Xi-Kim summit is a continuation of the authoritarian bloc trend already priced in.

top_events.title: Xi Jinping arrives in Pyongyang to revitalise China-North Korea ties
top_events.summary: Xi's visit deepens the China-DPRK axis, reinforcing the authoritarian bloc that indirectly pressures NATO's eastern flank where Poland sits. Already tracked in state of world but now confirmed as active diplomatic move.

top_events.title: El Niño under way and threatens weather extremes
top_events.summary: El Niño officially confirmed; indirect risk to global food and energy prices which feed into Polish inflation and cost of living.

top_events.title: US-Iran war to pull global economy to post-COVID low: World Bank
top_events.summary: Ongoing World Bank warning; energy price pressure on Poland remains elevated but this is a continuation of the established risk scenario.
